creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Emmanuel Vadot (elbarto@arcadebsd.org) wrote:

(Duplicating message send via private email a while ago, still
unanswered, as a followup).

>  Sorry for that.
>  New shar with correct dependency attached.

Good. May I suggest using more verbose knobs? s|V|VIDEO|, s|S|SOUND|,
s|I|INPUT| would be better.

Also it does not respect CC/CXX/CFLAGS/CXXFLAGS and LOCALBASE (and maybe
PREFIX).

Finally note that it's ONLY_FOR_ARCHS, not ARCH, and it also needs
USE_XORG+=x11.

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
amdmi3@amdmi3.ru  ..:  jabber: amdmi3@jabber.ru    http://www.amdmi3.ru
